certificate.permits_boundary:
permits:
  exec: true
  tools: ["nika:assert", "nika:emit", "nika:fetch", "nika:notify", "nika:read", "nika:wait", "nika:write"]

# review — effects too dynamic to pin statically:
#   · task `logs` uses the shell-string exec form — a program allowlist applies only to the array form; `exec` widened to `true` (rewrite to the array form for a tighter permit)
#   · task `status_history` reaches a dynamic URL — `net.http` cannot express 'any host'; add the resolved host(s) before running
#   · task `runbook` uses a dynamic path — `fs` cannot express 'any path'; add the resolved path(s) before running
#   · task `recheck` reaches a dynamic URL — `net.http` cannot express 'any host'; add the resolved host(s) before running
#   · task `save` uses a dynamic path — `fs` cannot express 'any path'; add the resolved path(s) before running
#   · task `ping (on_finally)` reaches a dynamic URL — `net.http` cannot express 'any host'; add the resolved host(s) before running
